message:
🌐 i18n: broader sweep of CanIChecker/Compute/DrasiReactiveGraph (#8160) (#8167)

Addresses Copilot review comments from merged PR #8154 that flagged
remaining hardcoded user-facing strings in three files where only a
single string had been extracted previously.

- CanIChecker: extract the "Add custom group..." placeholder, the
  "Remove group" aria-label, and the "Common API Groups" advanced
  help block.
- Compute: extract the Cluster Comparison "selected" / "Clear" /
  "Compare" controls, the select/deselect aria-labels, and the
  "No clusters available" empty state.
- DrasiReactiveGraph: extract all Configure Source / Configure
  Continuous Query modal content (titles, subtitles, Name, Source
  Type, Query Type, Query label and placeholder, Close aria-labels,
  ID label) and wire them through useTranslation.

Reuses existing actions.save / actions.cancel / actions.close, and
adds a new actions.clear. New keys live under rbac.* / compute.* /
drasi.* in web/src/locales/en/common.json.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
